description: Inserts an ActivityLog row (if not exists for type+objectId) and an ActivityLogEntry row. descriptionTranslationKey is a locale resource key — resolved at display time. Used to show 'who did what and when' per data object.
name: CreateActivityLogEntry
trigger: Service operations that mutate customer-owned data: broadcast created, subscription import completed, positive list uploaded, standard receiver imported.

description: Batch variant of CreateActivityLogEntry. Used when multiple events occur in one operation (e.g. bulk import completing).
name: CreateActivityLogEntries
trigger: Bulk import operations, batch job completions.

description: Returns activity log entries for a specific object (e.g. all activity for FtpSetting Id=42). Optional maxRecords limits response. Used by admin UI to show change history per entity.
name: GetActivityLogs
trigger: Admin UI requests history for a data object.
